description: PERFORM with inline body END-PERFORM: add 1 to counter 3 times without paragraph call.
notes: IBM gap: PERFORM 3 TIMES with inline body should iterate 3 times, giving WS-COUNTER=3. Engine executes the inline body only once (WS-COUNTER=1). Inline PERFORM TIMES loop iteration is not fully implemented — engine treats it as a single execution. Use PERFORM paragraph-name 3 TIMES for correct behavior.
